---
title: ""
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

<style>
/* Remove Quarto width limits */
#quarto-content main {
  max-width: none;
  padding: 0;
}

/* Full-width hero section */
.full-hero {
  position: relative;
  left: 50%;
  right: 50%;
  margin-left: -50vw;
  margin-right: -50vw;
  width: 100vw;

  min-height: 80vh;

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;

  text-align: center;

  background:
    linear-gradient(rgba(0,0,0,0.35), rgba(0,0,0,0.35)),
    url("images/home_photo.png");

  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
}
</style>

<div class="full-hero">

<div style="font-size:7rem; font-weight:700; line-height:1.1; color:white;">
Oluwaseyi Ezekiel

</div>

<div style="font-size:4rem; margin-top:1px; margin-bottom:0px; color:white;">
Geospatial and Remote Sensing Scientist
</div>

<div style="width:300px; height:5px; background:#f0f0f0; margin:30px 0;"></div>

<a href="about.html" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg">View Portfolio</a>

</div>
